zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD报64450.57美元，价格位于20日均线64240.80上方运行，显示中短期趋势仍保持偏多结构。但24小时小幅下跌0.48%，且接近日内低点，反映多头动能有所放缓，市场进入高位整理阶段。

从技术指标看，MACD数值为222.05且维持正值区域，说明中期上涨趋势尚未被破坏，多头仍占据优势。不过RSI数据暂缺，无法进一步确认超买或超卖状态。结合价格与均线关系分析，目前仍属于震荡偏强格局。

关键支撑位关注64240美元附近的20日均线区域，其次为64000美元整数关口。若跌破上述位置，可能进一步测试63500美元支撑。上方阻力位位于64790美元日内高点附近，突破后有望挑战65000至65500美元区间。

交易策略方面，短线投资者可关注64200至64400美元区域的回踩企稳机会，以顺势做多为主。若价格有效突破64800美元，可考虑跟进突破交易；若跌破64000美元，则需警惕调整风险并严格控制仓位与止损。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading around 64,450 after a modest 0.48% intraday decline, showing signs of short-term consolidation rather than a directional reversal. Price action remains compressed between recent highs near 64,788 and current levels, indicating equilibrium after prior upward momentum. Despite the mild pullback, structure still leans constructive as buyers continue to defend dips near the short-term moving average zone.

MACD remains positive at 222, suggesting underlying bullish momentum is still intact, even if immediate acceleration has cooled. The absence of a visible signal line reading limits full crossover confirmation, but the histogram bias favors continuation over reversal. Price holding above the 20-period SMA at 64,240 reinforces short-term trend stability. Without RSI data, momentum is primarily inferred from structure and moving average behavior.

Immediate resistance sits at 64,788, the latest intraday high, and a clean break above it could open the path toward the psychological 65,000 level. On the downside, initial support is anchored at the SMA20 near 64,240, followed by a deeper demand area around 64,000. A sustained breakdown below this zone would weaken the current bullish structure and likely trigger a broader corrective phase.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor a range-focused approach in the near term, with long entries more attractive near support and partial profit-taking into resistance. Breakout traders may prefer confirmation above 64,800 before targeting continuation toward higher liquidity zones. If resistance holds, short-term pullbacks remain possible, making tight risk control and defined invalidation levels essential in this compressed volatility environment.
